pattern: Repeatedly smashing the two heaviest stones is a max-heap simulation: pop the two largest, push back their difference, until one or none remain.
hints: Each turn you only ever need the two largest current weights — what structure hands those to you fast?
A max-heap lets you pull the heaviest two, and the smash result is just their difference if it is non-zero.
Heapify the weights as a max-heap; while two or more remain, pop a and b and push a-b if positive; return the survivor or 0.

edge_inputs.description: mixed weights leaving a single stone
two equal stones annihilate to zero
all equal even count leaves nothing
all equal odd count leaves one
